fields.name: tolerance
fields.condition: body_serial_type == PRC_TYPE_TOPO_BrepDataCompress || body_serial_type == PRC_TYPE_TOPO_SingleWireBodyCompress || body_serial_type == PRC_TYPE_TESS_3D_Compressed
fields.condition_rust: self.body_serial_type.value == PRC_TYPE_TOPO_BrepDataCompress as u32 || self.body_serial_type.value == PRC_TYPE_TOPO_SingleWireBodyCompress as u32 || self.body_serial_type.value == PRC_TYPE_TESS_3D_Compressed as u32

fields.name: rotation
fields.condition_rust: ((self.behavior.value as u8 & PRC_TRANSFORMATION_Rotate as u8) != 0) && ((self.behavior.value as u8 & PRC_TRANSFORMATION_NonOrtho as u8) == 0)

fields.name: rotation
fields.condition_rust: ((self.behavior.value as u8 & PRC_TRANSFORMATION_Rotate as u8) != 0) && ((self.behavior.value as u8& PRC_TRANSFORMATION_NonOrtho as u8) == 0)

TransformationUNUSED.comment: this struct is not used and can be removed

fields.name: texture_mapping_operator
fields.condition_rust: self.texture_mapping_type.value as i32 == TextureMappingType::Operator as i32

fields.name: blend_src
fields.condition_rust: self.texture_function.value as i32 == TextureFunction::Blend as i32

fields.name: type_of_entity
fields.SPECBUG: has also seen PRC_TYPE_TOPO_Edge in e.g. -342, -344

VertexColors.comment:
The number_of_colors stored in the color_data must be calculated from the number of point indices
- found in the wire_indexes array in the case of a PRC_TYPE_TESS_3D_Wire
- found in the sizes_triangulated in the case of a PRC_TYPE_TESS_Face

BACKUP.name: is_segment_color
BACKUP.comment: asy does not write this field

fields.name: origin_array
fields.SPECBUG: missing OPTIONAL for field in 2014 spec

fields.name: edge_status_array
fields.comment: for each triangle, used to describe the triangles neighbors

fields.name: triangle_face_array
fields.comment: represents, for each triangle, the index of the face to which it belongs.

fields.name: point_is_reference_array
fields.comment: indicates whether a point is a reference

fields.name: point_reference_array
fields.comment: in this case, the boolean value which indicates whether the character array is compressed is not stored. Its value is implicit and set to number_of_reference_points > 3

fields.name: is_face_planar
fields.comment: above size if wrong, SPECBUG not in spec

fields.name: is_point_color_on_face
fields.comment: above size if wrong, SPECBUG not in spec

fields.name: is_multiple_line_attribute_on_face
fields.comment: above size if wrong, SPECBUG not in spec

fields.name: face_has_texture
fields.comment: above size if wrong, SPECBUG not in spec
FIXME: above array size is guesswork

fields.name: extend_type
fields.comment: Indicates how the surface is extended; see EPRCExtendType

fields.name: id
fields.comment: PRC_HCG_Line, PRC_HCG_Circle, PRC_HCG_BSplineHermiteCurve or PRC_HCG_CompositeCurve. The curve type PRC_HCG_Ellipse is reserved for future use.

fields.name: curve_is_not_already_stored
fields.comment: this represents a boolean flag that means curve_is_NOT_already_stored is TRUE; it is used when reading a PRC File to signal the end of the curves in a loop and the end of all loops.

fields.name: id
fields.comment: Will be PRC_HCG_EndLoop for last loop and PRC_HCG_NewLoop for all other loops

fields.name: point_on_torus
fields.condition: all_loops_are_vertex_loops() && ctx.get_surface_type() == PRC_HCG_AnaTorus as u32 && is_trimmed.value

fields.name: multiplicity
fields.comment: number_bits is either number_bits_u or number_bits_v from CompressedNurbs

fields.name: multiplicity
fields.comment: number_bits is either number_bits_u or number_bits_v from CompressedNurbs

fields.name: degree_in_u
fields.on_set: _ctx.CompressedNurbs_number_bits_u = if degree_in_u.value!=0 {( (degree_in_u.value as f64 + 2.0).ln() / (2.0_f64).ln()).ceil() as u32} else {2_u32};

fields.name: degree_in_v
fields.on_set: _ctx.CompressedNurbs_number_bits_v = if degree_in_v.value!=0 {( (degree_in_v.value as f64 + 2.0).ln() / (2.0_f64).ln()).ceil() as u32} else {2_u32};
